about.header.desc.message: Concept and features provided by sawara.me

about.concept.free.desc.message: sawara.me is a site that provides small, useful tools for solving minor daily inconveniences for free. We aim to be a place where you can use them immediately whenever needed, without being bothered by tedious registration, login, or advertisements.

about.concept.secure.desc.message: No need to worry about privacy. Whether you want to compress images or generate passwords, all processing takes place entirely within your browser. Your data is never sent to any external server.

about.extension.desc.message: In addition to web tools, we also publish and provide custom extensions for Chrome and Edge to improve usability on specific sites or significantly enhance development efficiency.

home.description.message: sawara.me — A site with small, useful tools and applications to solve minor daily inconveniences.

home.tools.subtitle.message: Simple tools for everyday use that run entirely in your browser.

home.tools.password.desc.message: Create passwords with specific conditions. Settings are included in the URL for easy sharing. Runs safely in the browser.

home.tools.text.desc.message: A place to temporarily save text. Saved text is stored in your browser's local storage.

home.tools.device.desc.message: Displays screen size and user agent information for your current device.

home.tools.qr.desc.message: Generate QR codes from URLs or text. Supports logo embedding, Wi-Fi setup, and calendar event creation.

home.tools.qr-reader.desc.message: Upload a QR code image to decode the embedded string. URLs can be opened directly. All processing is done in the browser.

home.tools.date.desc.message: Calculate the difference between two dates. Supports various date input formats.

home.tools.exif.desc.message: Read photo metadata like shooting date, camera info, and GPS. Photos are processed locally for safety.

home.tools.resize.desc.message: Lighten and convert images to WebP format in the browser. Supports batch processing and EXIF removal.

home.tools.pdf2img.desc.message: Convert PDF pages to images. Select specific pages with previews. Runs safely in the browser.

home.tools.benchmark.desc.message: Measure your device's computing performance in the browser and evaluate with scores and ranks.

home.extensions.subtitle.message: Extensions available on the Chrome Web Store to make your development and browsing more comfortable.

home.extensions.envicon.desc.message: A browser extension for developers that changes the favicon based on production, staging, and development environments.

home.extensions.geminispark.desc.message: An extension to enhance the Google Gemini web interface. Use Enter for new lines and Cmd/Ctrl+Enter to send.

home.extensions.mdpicker.desc.message: Easily copy web page links in Markdown format with this browser extension.

theme.docs.paginator.next.description: The label used to navigate to the next doc

theme.docs.versions.latestVersionLinkLab.description: The label used for the latest version suggestion link label

theme.common.editThisPage.description: The link label to edit the current page

theme.lastUpdated.byUser.description: The words used to describe by who the page has been last updated

theme.tags.tagsListLabel.description: The label alongside a tag list

theme.DocSidebarItem.expandCategoryAriaL.description: The ARIA label to expand the sidebar category

theme.DocSidebarItem.collapseCategoryAri.description: The ARIA label to collapse the sidebar category

theme.IconExternalLink.ariaLabel.description: The ARIA label for the external link icon

theme.blog.tagTitle.description: The title of the page for a blog tag

theme.blog.author.pageTitle.description: The title of the page for a blog author

theme.blog.authorsList.pageTitle.description: The title of the authors page

theme.blog.author.noPosts.message: This author has not written any posts yet.
theme.blog.author.noPosts.description: The text for authors with 0 blog post

theme.contentVisibility.unlistedBanner.m.message: This page is unlisted. Search engines will not index it, and only users having a direct link can access it.

theme.contentVisibility.draftBanner.mess.message: This page is a draft. It will only be visible in dev and be excluded from the production build.

theme.docs.DocCard.categoryDescription.p.description: The default description for a category card in the generated index about how many items this category includes

theme.ErrorPageContent.tryAgain.description: The label of the button to try again rendering when the React error boundary captures an error

theme.common.skipToMainContent.description: The skip to content label used for accessibility, allowing to rapidly navigate to main content with keyboard tab/enter navigation

theme.tags.tagsPageTitle.description: The title of the tag list page

date.header.desc.message: Calculate the difference between two dates. Supports various date input formats.

device.header.desc.message: Displays screen size and user agent information for your current device.

device.ip.bot.message: Detected as a bot/crawler. IP address is not displayed.

device.disclaimer.message: ※ For privacy protection, the exact value may be restricted or rounded by the browser.

text.header.desc.message: A place to temporarily save text. Saved text is stored in your browser's local storage.

password.header.desc.message: Create passwords with specific conditions. Settings are included in the URL for easy sharing. Runs safely in the browser.

exif.header.desc.message: Read camera info, shooting date, GPS, and other metadata from uploaded photos. Photos are processed locally for safety.

exif.upload.dropLabel.message: Click or drag & drop to select a file

exif.upload.formats.message: Supported format: JPEG (EXIF reading is primarily supported for JPEG)

exif.error.parse.message: Failed to load or parse EXIF data from the file.

qr.header.desc.message: Generate QR codes from URLs and various types of information. Supports logo embedding.

qr.text.placeholder.message: Enter a URL or text here

qr.guide.step1.message: Select the type of QR code you want to generate from the dropdown.

qr.guide.step2.message: Enter the required information (such as URL or Wi-Fi details), and the QR code will be generated in real-time.

qr.guide.step3.message: Optionally, you can place a logo image in the center of the QR code (using a preset logo or custom image).

qr.guide.step4.message: Download the completed QR code by clicking 'Save', or copy it directly to your clipboard using 'Copy QR'.

qr.guide.security.message: 🔒 All entered information and logo images are processed entirely within your device (in-browser) and are never sent to any server.

qrReader.header.desc.message: Upload a QR code image to decode the embedded string. All processing is done in the browser — images are never sent to a server.

qrReader.upload.ariaLabel.message: Select or drop a QR code image

qrReader.upload.dropLabel.message: Click, drag & drop, or paste to select an image

qrReader.upload.formats.message: Supported formats: PNG / JPEG / WebP / GIF / BMP

qrReader.error.notQR.message: No QR code found. Please check that the image is clear.

qrReader.guide.step1.message: Select or drag & drop an image file containing a QR code.

qrReader.guide.step2.message: The QR code is automatically decoded and the embedded text is displayed.

qrReader.guide.step3.message: Copy the result to the clipboard with the copy button. URLs can also be opened directly.

qrReader.guide.security.message: 🔒 Uploaded images are never sent to a server. All processing is done in the browser.

resize.header.desc.message: Crop and convert images to WebP and other formats entirely in the browser. Images are never sent to a server.

resize.upload.dropLabel.message: Click, drag & drop, or paste to select

resize.upload.formats.message: Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, etc. (Paste with Cmd/Ctrl+V also works)

resize.format.webpWarning.message: ※ Your browser does not support WebP conversion. JPEG is recommended.

resize.exif.webpNote.message: EXIF data cannot be preserved when converting to WebP/PNG due to browser limitations.

resize.error.webpUnsupported.message: Your browser does not support WebP conversion. Please select JPEG.

resize.guide.step1.message: Select the images you want to optimize by dragging and dropping or clicking (multiple selection supported).

resize.guide.step2.message: If needed, you can crop the images using the 'Crop' button.

resize.guide.step3.message: Adjust the output format (WebP recommended), maximum width, and quality from the 'Optimization Settings'.

resize.guide.step4.message: Click 'Start Optimization' to process the images within your browser.

resize.guide.step5.message: After processing, use the 'Compare' button to check the image quality, and click 'Download' to save the images.

resize.guide.security.message: 🔒 Image optimization and cropping are performed entirely on your device (in-browser). Your data is never sent to any external server.

pdf2img.header.desc.message: Convert PDF files page by page to images (PNG, JPEG, WebP). All processing is done in the browser — files are never sent to a server.

pdf2img.upload.dropLabel.message: Click, drag & drop, or paste (ctrl+v) to select a PDF

pdf2img.guide.step1.message: Select, drag & drop, or paste from clipboard to add the PDF file you want to convert.

pdf2img.guide.step2.message: Set the output format (PNG / JPEG / WebP) and maximum width.

pdf2img.guide.step3.message: Select the pages you want to save as images (multiple selections allowed).

pdf2img.guide.step4.message: Click the 'Download Images' button to download the images (as a ZIP file if multiple).

pdf2img.guide.security.message: 🔒 Uploaded PDF files are not sent to any server. All processing is completed within your browser, making it safe even for documents containing sensitive information.

benchmark.header.desc.message: Measure your browser and device's computing performance, evaluated with scores and ranks.

benchmark.ui.testDesc.message: Click the "Start Test" button to run intensive computations in the browser and calculate a performance score.

benchmark.ui.warning.message: This benchmark runs intensive calculations, which may temporarily drain the battery on smartphones and mobile devices.

benchmark.single.rank.s.message: Unrivaled speed. Top-tier processing power, even among the latest high-end devices.

benchmark.single.rank.a.message: Comfortable. Most web apps run smoothly without any stress.

benchmark.single.rank.b.message: Practical. Sufficient for general web browsing.

benchmark.single.rank.c.message: Standard. Enough for viewing typical pages.

benchmark.single.rank.d.message: Basic. Complex pages may take a little longer to load.

benchmark.single.rank.e.message: Slow. May be an older device or in power-saving mode.

benchmark.single.rank.f.message: Struggling. Significantly underpowered for modern web services.

benchmark.multi.rank.s.message: Top tier. Overwhelming parallel processing power for any demanding workload.

benchmark.multi.rank.a.message: Powerful. Handles multiple simultaneous tasks with ease.

benchmark.multi.rank.b.message: Comfortable. Handles multiple parallel tasks with headroom to spare.

benchmark.multi.rank.c.message: Standard. Capable of multitasking without issues.

benchmark.multi.rank.d.message: Minimal. Performance may degrade under heavy parallel workloads.

benchmark.multi.rank.e.message: Insufficient. Not suited for parallel processing; performance is limited.

benchmark.multi.rank.f.message: Severely underpowered. Barely benefits from parallel processing.

benchmark.cat.sns.summary.message: Smooth and high-quality viewing of images and videos

benchmark.cat.sns.avif.desc.message: Next-generation lightweight images. Directly affects loading speed.

benchmark.cat.sns.av1.desc.message: Allows playback of 4K videos like YouTube with low overhead and high quality.

benchmark.cat.sns.webshare.desc.message: Calls the OS standard share menu to quickly share images or links.

benchmark.cat.sns.speculation.desc.message: Preloads pages before clicking links, enabling instant screen transitions.

benchmark.cat.sns.fetchpriority.desc.message: Prioritizes loading important images to improve display speed.

benchmark.cat.sns.objectfit.desc.message: Ensures photos fit beautifully within their frames without stretching or squishing.

benchmark.cat.sns.csslayer.desc.message: Ensures styles on large sites are correctly applied as intended.

benchmark.cat.biz.summary.message: Can run app-grade sites like Notion and Figma

benchmark.cat.biz.eyedropper.desc.message: Eyedropper tool to extract any color on the screen. Streamlines design work.

benchmark.cat.biz.navigation.desc.message: Next-gen foundational technology for smoother, more stable SPA screen transitions.

benchmark.cat.biz.anchorpos.desc.message: Ensures popups stick correctly to their target buttons.

benchmark.cat.biz.popover.desc.message: Displays menus on top of all other elements without interference.

benchmark.cat.biz.compression.desc.message: Allows fast ZIP compression and decompression directly in the browser.

benchmark.cat.biz.crypto.desc.message: Enables secure communication, password management, and encryption.

benchmark.cat.biz.indexeddb.desc.message: Stores large amounts of data to allow working offline.

benchmark.cat.creative.webgpu.desc.message: Runs full-scale 3D games and AI image generation in the browser.

benchmark.cat.creative.webxr.desc.message: Directly controls VR and AR devices from the browser.

benchmark.cat.creative.viewtransitions.d.message: Smoothly fades screen transitions like a native app.

benchmark.cat.creative.offscreencanvas.d.message: Offloads heavy graphics processing to the background for smoother performance.

benchmark.cat.creative.spatialaudio.desc.message: Supports spatial (3D) audio natively in the browser.

benchmark.cat.sys.summary.message: App-like features, notifications, and login comfort

benchmark.cat.sys.passkeys.desc.message: Enables passwordless logins using fingerprint or face recognition.

benchmark.cat.sys.badging.desc.message: Displays unread badges on app icons.

benchmark.cat.sys.wakelock.desc.message: Prevents the screen from turning off automatically while browsing.

benchmark.cat.sys.webusb.desc.message: Directly controls USB-connected devices from the browser.

benchmark.cat.sys.filesystem.desc.message: Directly edits and saves files on your device.

benchmark.ref.rank.s.desc.message: Unrivaled speed. Top-tier performance surpassing high-end devices.

benchmark.ref.rank.a.desc.message: Very comfortable. Most apps run extremely smoothly.

benchmark.ref.rank.b.desc.message: Comfortable. Headroom to spare even when multitasking.

benchmark.ref.rank.c.desc.message: Standard. Sufficient performance for general web browsing.

benchmark.ref.rank.d.desc.message: Basic. Loading may slow down under load.

benchmark.ref.rank.e.desc.message: Slow. May be an older device or in power-saving mode.

benchmark.ref.rank.f.desc.message: Struggling. Significantly underpowered for modern web standards.

benchmark.share.alert.message:
Result image copied to clipboard!
Please paste and post it on X (Twitter) or other apps.
